name: Christmas Butter Cookies #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg, milk, and vanilla.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
5. Chill the dough for ease in handling.
6. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thickness.
7. Cut into desired shapes using floured cookie cutters.
8. Bake on a baking sheet in a preheated oven at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Remove from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
Makes 4-5 dozen cookies. Each cookie contains approximately 78 calories, 0.9 grams of protein, 4 grams of fat, 9.6 grams of carbohydrates, 15 milligrams of cholesterol, and 59.2 milligrams of sodium. From: Texas Department of Agriculture.
